Notice Of Motion For Order 1. Compelling Psyciatric Ime, 2. Compelling Release Of Pltf'S Records Of Psychiatric Treatment 3. Compelling Release Of Pltf'S Medicare Records; 4. Awarding Monetary Sanctions Against Pltf And Pltf'S Counsel
Off Calendar May-16-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Kimberly A. Bliss for Defendant and Moving Party City and County of San Francisco
John H. Aspelin for Plaintiff and Opposing Party

Hearing Held and tentative ruling adopted with modification.
Defendant City & County of San Francisco's motion to compel a mental examination and for an order to release medical records is granted. The records are to be produced within 10 days of notice of this order. The examination by Dr. Hooker is to be completed within 30 days of notice of this order on a date mutually convenient to the parties. The Court finds that plaintiff opposed the motion without substantial justification. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $500 are to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order.
MODIFICATION: Parties to submit stipulation order to schedule IME and for release of records. Order signed in open court. Comm. Bruce E. Chan.

MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-09-2006 Text Ruling
